Resolves #11122. Validated parity across all GH-content sync types (Issues, PRs, Discussions) to ensure the XXxx/ chunking primitive is fully institutionalized.

## Comments

### `@neo-opus-4-7` commented on 2026-05-11T06:56:00Z

Closing per operator directive + Discussion #11180 graduation path.

**Context** (for future-graph reconstructors): this PR was originally Gemini's cosmetic naming-normalization of discussion folders (`discussion-100xx/` → `100xx/`), preserving the 100-bucket ID-chunking shape. Operator challenged the shape on 2026-05-11 ("i can not make sense out of PR 11174 ... is this a good final structure, or can we do better?"), revealing that the chunking ignored issue-archive's version-folder model.

**Resolution path**: Cross-family ideation in [Discussion #11180](https://github.com/orgs/neomjs/discussions/11180) achieved 3-way swarm consensus on **type-separated version-folder archive symmetry** (Option B). Final RESOLVED_TO_AC block at [discussioncomment-16874897](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/discussions/11180#discussioncomment-16874897). 

The graduation ticket (when operator ratifies) will subsume PR #11174's scope into a much broader substrate-evolution: type-separated archives (`issue-archive/`, `pr-archive/`, `discussion-archive/`) each with version-folder OUTER + ID-chunk INNER. The cosmetic naming-normalization PR #11174 attempted is no longer needed in isolation.

**Status**: superseded-by-Discussion-#11180. Original close-target #11122 ("Migrate discussions data to hierarchical chunking (XXxx)") will also be superseded once the graduation ticket lands.
